releases.label: DR2
releases.summary: DR2 BAO cosmology papers (Mar 2025) and cosmology chains/derived products (Oct 2025) are public; the full spectra/redshift release (3 years of main survey) is still pending.

releases.label: DR1
releases.summary: First full public data release: ~18.7M redshifts from Year-1 main survey (BGS, LRG, ELG, QSO, MWS) plus all spectra; basis of the DR1 BAO and full-shape cosmology results.

releases.label: EDR
releases.summary: Early Data Release: Survey Validation spectra (~1.8M, incl. ~1.2M extragalactic redshifts); target-selection validation for all main target classes.
